item.name: Rasa Fish
item.description:
This wavekin's scales are so beautiful that they appear wrought from copper, and as such it fetches a rather impressive price at market.

[Suitable for display in aquariums tier 2 and higher.]
[Suitable for printing on medium canvases.]

fish.guide: A saltwater wavekin capable of living well over fifty years. Little wonder, then, that its name derives from the word for “vitality,” and that those in Thavnair use it to symbolize longevity.
